overall.description: A first-person exploration of a medieval castle courtyard and upper walkways in a high-quality game engine. The camera moves from the ground level past a central well, ascends a stone staircase, and traverses wooden balconies overlooking the courtyard.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a sunlit medieval courtyard with a stone well at its center. The camera moves forward across cobblestones toward a large arched gate, then pans upward to reveal towering stone fortifications with red banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone staircase ascending to upper level

events.description: turns right toward the stone staircase built into the courtyard wall
enters the covered wooden balcony structure at the top of the stairs

arched wooden door at the top of the staircase
lit iron lantern mounted on the stone wall

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right and approaches a stone staircase built into the courtyard wall. It ascends the worn steps, passing a lit wall lantern, and enters a darker wooden doorway at the top.

events.description: emerges from covered walkway to open balcony overlook with view of courtyard below

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden balcony and observing the courtyard from above

entered.detail: weathered wooden planks forming the balcony walkway
stone archway leading to grassy courtyard area across the way
grassy area with stone pathways visible below the balcony

segments.scene_description: Moving along a wooden balcony with timber framing, the camera passes wall lanterns and emerges to overlook the courtyard. The view reveals an arched stone passageway and grassy area below, with the castle's stone towers rising in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the open, sunlit expanse of a medieval courtyard up into the shadowed heights of the castle's fortifications. It begins by gliding across cobblestones past a central stone well toward a large arched gate, before panning upward to reveal towering walls adorned with red banners. The camera then turns right to ascend a set of worn stone steps, passing a lit wall lantern as it transitions from the bright exterior into a darker wooden doorway. Moving along a timber-framed balcony lined with lanterns, the perspective finally emerges to overlook the courtyard below, revealing an arched stone passageway and grassy areas framed by the castle's rising towers.
